pricing: satUSD/USD from DIA feed divided by USDC/USD from Chainlink feed, scaled for 36+6-18 decimal offset.
notes: Concerning: base (collateral) feed relies on DIA rather than native Chainlink, introducing an opaque and less battle-tested data source for a niche stablecoin (satUSD). Quote feed is standard Chainlink USDC/USD. No vault wrappers, no secondary feeds, no proxy upgradeability (immutable MorphoChainlinkOracleV2). Market is unverified with no vault curators. High LLTV (91.5%) amplifies oracle risk.
